name: AVAudioEngine Multi-Track Mixing (DJ / Audio Production)
antiPatterns: Using AVAudioPlayer for multi-track mixing — AVAudioPlayer cannot mix, crossfade, or apply real-time effects; use AVAudioEngine with AVAudioPlayerNode
Calling engine.connect() before engine.attach() — attach all nodes first, then connect
Accessing floatChannelData without optional chaining — it returns UnsafePointer<UnsafeMutablePointer<Float>>? and force-unwrapping crashes at runtime
Using the deprecated UIDocumentPickerViewController(documentTypes:in:) initializer — use UIDocumentPickerViewController(forOpeningContentTypes:) with UTType
Forgetting url.startAccessingSecurityScopedResource() after picking a document — without it the audio file cannot be read from the sandbox
Forgetting to set eq.bands[n].bypass = false — AVAudioUnitEQ bands are bypassed by default and have no effect until explicitly enabled
Wrong EQ connection order — must be playerNode → eq → mixer → mainMixer, not playerNode → mixer → eq
Passing raw Color to Canvas context.fill/stroke with: parameter — use .color(Color.green) not Color.green directly
Using playerNode.nodeTime(forHostTime:) to get current time — this method does not exist; use AVAudioTime(hostTime: mach_absolute_time()) to create a current-time AVAudioTime value

Passing a UInt64 to the `at:` parameter of schedule(buffer:at:options:) or schedule(file:at:options:) — the `at:` parameter takes AVAudioTime?, not a raw host time integer; pass nil to play immediately or AVAudioTime(hostTime: mach_absolute_time()) to play now
